description_long: This is a blocky, stylized doll with a cubic head and rectangular body, arms, and legs, reminiscent of voxel art or Minecraft-inspired design. The doll features short, straight black hair with a side part, and a simple face with minimalistic features, including a single black eye and a peach-toned face. It is dressed in a plain white shirt with short sleeves and black pants, with the shirt extending slightly over the waist. The arms are peach-colored, matching the face, and the legs are solid black, giving the appearance of shoes or boots. The overall construction suggests a toy made primarily from plastic, designed for durability and play in urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A blocky, voxel-style doll with short black hair, a white shirt, and black pants, featuring minimal facial details and a simple, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, white shirt, black pants, and both arms extended downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the head, the side part in the hair, and the thickness of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the plain back of the shirt, and the solid black legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other profile and the side of the head and body.
attribute_clothing_style: Minimalist casual style with a plain white short-sleeve shirt and solid black pants, typical of generic urban or contemporary toy fashion.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms straight down at the sides and legs together, head facing forward, and torso aligned vertically.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a single black eye and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving a simple, emotionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight black hair with a side part, blocky and geometric in shape.
